hero.title: Agricultural drone spraying with precision, efficiency and outstanding performance
hero.subtitle: Smart solutions for targeted application, reduced waste and greater efficiency in the field.
hero.imageAlt: Agricultural drone applying inputs in a field with precision

benefits.title: Benefits that make a difference
benefits.description: A combination of technology, reliable operations and a focus on productivity, cost and sustainability.

items.title: Reduced waste
items.description: More precise application, with less input loss and better use of the treated area.

items.title: Precise application
items.description: Fine control of volume, dosage and coverage for each part of the crop.

items.title: Access to difficult areas
items.description: Efficient operation in uneven terrain, high-risk areas and hard-to-reach regions.

items.title: Less soil compaction
items.description: Reduced impact of machinery and preservation of soil structure.

items.title: Greater operational safety
items.description: Lower exposure for the operator and more controlled processes in the field.

items.title: Faster application
items.description: Quick response, uniform execution and shorter time per hectare.

services.title: Tailored solutions for every operation
services.description: We support producers and companies with professional planning, execution and follow-up.

items.title: Agricultural drone spraying
items.description: Aerial application with precision for crops, areas and specific demands.

items.title: Targeted application
items.description: Application strategies focused on critical points and priority areas.

items.title: Mapping and planning
items.description: Operational surveys based on data and predefined routes for each area.

items.title: Scalable support
items.description: Solutions for small, medium and large areas with operational flexibility.

items.title: Technical support
items.description: Specialized follow-up before, during and after application.

items.title: Tracking and reporting
items.description: Operational tracking with coverage, execution and outcome records.

why.title: Why use drones for spraying?
why.description: The technology allows more precision, speed and predictability, keeping pace with modern production.
points: More controlled application with less waste.
Faster operations with better use of time.
Better access to hard-to-maneuver and irregular terrain.
Better planning with operational data and execution tracking.

technology.title: Every application is built with precision and consistency
technology.description: Each step is designed to deliver uniformity, safety and operational performance.

items.title: DJI Agras T70P — our equipment
items.description: 70 L spray tank (40 L/min flow rate), 100 L spreading tank (400 kg/min flow rate) and payload capacity of up to 70 kg.

items.title: Route planning
items.description: Definition of trajectories and strategies for optimized area coverage.

items.title: Uniform application
items.description: Stable flow for consistent distribution across the field.

items.title: Monitoring of applied areas
items.description: Process follow-up with execution control and records.

about.title: Modern technology for a growing field
about.description: AgroDrone Solutions was created to bring modern aerial spraying solutions to the field by combining technology, operational efficiency and commitment to the rural producer.
about.highlight: Six years of market experience and more than 70,000 hectares applied with precision — a track record that sets us apart from the competition.
about.coverageNote: Currently serving these states, with new areas added regularly.

cta.title: Bring more precision to your farm
cta.description: Get in touch and request an assessment for your area.

contact.title: Let’s talk about your operation
contact.description: Reach out directly via WhatsApp or e-mail for a quick assessment.
contact.socialText: Our Instagram is the main channel for updates, behind-the-scenes content and field applications.

instagram.title: Follow our work on Instagram
instagram.description: Instagram is AgroDrone Solutions’ main channel for frequent updates, behind-the-scenes content, drone videos and field demonstrations.
instagram.note: Fast updates, operational results and behind-the-scenes work in the field.
